findings.title: Doctor remediation still points project repair at setup
findings.rationale: Doctor still tells users to run codex1 setup for repo-local config, hooks, AGENTS.md, and skills repair. setup is now a global boundary that does not mutate projects, so following doctor remediation will not fix the reported project state.
findings.suggested_next_action: Update project-scoped doctor remediation text to use codex1 init, leaving setup guidance only for global setup surfaces.

findings.title: Setup accepts repo-root but ignores it
findings.rationale: codex1 setup still accepts --repo-root but only reports that it is ignored, which preserves the stale project-scoped invocation shape and can make scripts appear successful while doing no project repair.
findings.suggested_next_action: Reject --repo-root on setup or remove it from setup args so stale project-scoped setup invocations fail loudly.
